name: Audius Governance
description: Governance attack via storage collision / re-initialization. Attacker re-initialized staking contract, set delegate manager to malicious contract, then passed proposal to transfer treasury tokens.
notes: Runtime bytecode (18141B) + 4 storage slot(s) cloned from original address at fork block. Proxy detected — impl 0x1c91af03a390b4c619b444425b3119e553b5b44b cloned to 0x1e21a6b4268432c9e62698e7f08f1f2cc9726942. No solc/constructor involved.

name: OlympusDAO BondFixedExpiry
description: Missing access control on redeemFixed() function. Anyone could redeem bonds without having actual bonds, calling redeemFixed with any amount drained the teller.
notes: Runtime bytecode (14435B) + 3 storage slot(s) cloned from original address at fork block. No solc/constructor involved.

name: Dexible
description: Arbitrary external call vulnerability in selfSwap(). The router address in RouterRequest was not validated, allowing attacker to pass arbitrary calldata to execute transferFrom on behalf of approved victims.
notes: Runtime bytecode (2054B) + 0 storage slot(s) cloned from original address at fork block. No solc/constructor involved.

name: Seneca Protocol
description: Arbitrary call vulnerability in performOperations(). OPERATION_CALL type executed arbitrary calldata against any target without access restriction, allowing draining of approved tokens from victim wallets.
notes: Runtime bytecode (45B) + 10 storage slot(s) cloned from original address at fork block. No solc/constructor involved.

name: Hedgey Finance
description: Missing input validation on createLockedCampaign(). Token claim contract accepted arbitrary token/amount inputs without verifying claimant authorization. Attacker used flash-loan funded fake claims.
notes: Runtime bytecode (7555B) + 2 storage slot(s) cloned from original address at fork block. No solc/constructor involved.
